label: scam
text: Sir, join our premium stock tips group. Our experts give guaranteed multibagger calls. Install this trading app, deposit twenty thousand to start, and you will see fifty percent profit in your account within a week.

label: scam
text: To receive the refund of two thousand in your account, just scan this QR code and enter your UPI pin. Once you scan it, the money will be credited to you immediately. Please scan now, the request expires soon.

label: scam
text: It's me, your nephew. I am in serious trouble with the police after an accident and I am too scared to call your brother. Please send forty thousand to this number right now and do not tell anyone in the family, I will explain later.

label: scam
text: Main CBI officer bol raha hoon, ye ek official video call hai. Aap digital arrest me hain, camera band mat karna, kahin jaana mat. Jaanch ke liye apne paise is verification account me transfer karo, warna g‍iraftaari hogi.

label: scam
text: Welcome to our earning channel. Complete simple tasks and get paid daily. Your first three tasks earned you 300, already added. Now recharge 5000 for a VIP task set and get 12000 back guaranteed.

label: scam
text: Bijli vibhag se hoon, aapke connection par bakaya hai, aaj raat katega. Turant is QR code ko scan karke payment kar dijiye, warna dobara connection ke liye bahut charge lagega.

label: scam
text: Your government subsidy of six thousand under the farmer scheme is pending. To receive the DBT payment, verify your bank account by sharing the OTP we sent, otherwise the amount will lapse this week.

label: scam
text: This is your courier. To confirm your parcel delivery I need the OTP that was just sent to your phone. Please read it out so I can mark the delivery as completed, otherwise the parcel goes back.

label: scam
text: Limited offer: send any amount of USDT to this wallet and receive double back within one hour, verified by our smart contract. Thousands have already doubled their money today. Do not miss this window.

label: scam
text: Your insurance claim of one lakh twenty thousand is approved. Before we release it, a small GST and processing charge must be paid into the settlement account. Pay today so the claim is credited to you tomorrow.

label: scam
text: मी मुंबई पोलिसातून बोलतोय, तुमच्या आधारवर एक गुन्हा नोंदवला गेला आहे. कोणालाही सांगू नका, कॅमेरा चालू ठेवा आणि तपासासाठी पैसे या सुरक्षित खात्यात ट्रान्सफर करा नाहीतर अटक होईल.

label: scam
text: To upgrade your SIM to 5G for free, we are sending an OTP now. Please share it so we can activate the upgrade. If you do not upgrade today your 4G services will be discontinued in your area.

label: scam
text: I have sent you an expensive gift and some cash from abroad as a token of my love, but it is stuck at customs. Please pay the clearance fee to this account and I will marry you soon and we will be together forever.

label: scam
text: Sir aapke card ke reward points aaj expire ho rahe hain, pandrah hazaar ke. Redeem karne ke liye main jo OTP bhej raha hoon wo bata dijiye aur card ke peeche ke teen number confirm kar dijiye.

label: scam
text: Congratulations, you are selected for a ground-staff job at the airport with a good salary. Pay the refundable uniform and ID card charge of two thousand nine hundred today to block your joining slot.

label: scam
text: Our system by mistake refunded fifty thousand to your account instead of five thousand. Please urgently transfer back the extra amount, otherwise our audit team will file a recovery case against you for the difference.

label: scam
text: You reached our bank helpline about your blocked card. To unblock it, please tell me your card number, the expiry, and the code on the back, and then confirm the OTP I am sending to verify it is really you.

label: scam
text: Aapne app se loan liya tha aur nahi chukaya. Abhi payment karo warna hum aapki morphed photo aapke sabhi contacts ko bhej denge aur aapko defaulter aur chor bata denge. Ye aakhri warning hai.

label: benign
text: You have received two thousand rupees from Rahul via UPI in your bank account. Your updated balance is available in the app. This is an automated payment notification.

label: benign
text: Your one time password for logging into your banking app is 5528. It is valid for five minutes. Do not share it with anyone. Your bank will never call to ask for this code.

label: benign
text: Your credit card statement is generated. The total due is eight thousand four hundred, payable by the twenty-second. You can pay through the app or net banking at your convenience. Thank you.

label: benign
text: Your monthly SIP of five thousand towards your mutual fund will be debited from your registered account on the fifth. No action is needed. For queries, contact your advisor through the official app.

label: benign
text: Your income tax refund of three thousand two hundred has been processed and credited to your pre-validated bank account. You can view the details by logging into the official income tax portal.

label: benign
text: We have received your insurance premium payment of twelve thousand for this year. Your policy is now active. The receipt is available on the official portal. Thank you for renewing on time.

label: benign
text: Aapka is mahine ka bijli bill teen sau chalis rupaye ka ban gaya hai, due date pandrah tareekh hai. Aap official website ya app se payment kar sakte hain. Dhanyavaad.

label: benign
source_note: genuine delivery OTP to the customer
text: Your delivery OTP is 8842. Please share it with the delivery agent only at the time of receiving your parcel. Your order will be delivered today between two and five in the evening.

label: benign
text: This is to confirm we received your child's term fee of fifteen thousand. The receipt has been emailed to you. Please keep it for your records. Thank you for the timely payment.

label: benign
text: Your payment of six hundred for the online doctor consultation is received. Your video appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at eleven. The joining link will be sent one hour before.

label: benign
text: Your flight booking is confirmed. Payment of four thousand five hundred received. Web check-in opens forty-eight hours before departure. Have a pleasant journey and carry a valid photo ID.

label: benign
text: Your salary slip for this month is now available on the employee portal. Your net pay has been credited to your registered account. For any discrepancy, contact the accounts team via the portal.

label: benign
text: Hi, your gym membership expires at the end of this month. You can renew at the front desk or through our app whenever convenient. There is a small early-renewal discount if you renew this week.

label: benign
text: Namaste, society ki AGM meeting is ravivar subah gyaarah baje club house me hai. Maintenance aur parking ke topics discuss honge. Aap zaroor aayiye, aapki upasthiti mahatvapoorn hai.

label: benign
text: Your annual subscription will auto-renew on the tenth for nine hundred ninety-nine using your saved card. If you wish to change or cancel, you can do so anytime in your account settings. Thank you.

label: benign
text: Your appointment at our bank branch for a locker discussion is confirmed for Thursday at three. Please carry your ID proof. We do not ask for passwords or OTPs over the phone at any time.

label: benign
text: Aapka train ticket confirm ho gaya hai, PNR message me diya hai. Payment mil gaya hai. Yatra ke samay original ID saath rakhiye. Shubh yatra.

label: benign
text: Your refund of one thousand two hundred for the returned item has been initiated and will reflect in your account in five to seven working days. No action is needed from your side. Thank you for shopping with us.

label: benign
text: We are pleased to offer you the position you interviewed for. Your offer letter is attached in the email. There is no fee or deposit at any stage. Please review and reply with your acceptance by Friday.

label: benign
source_note: genuine scheme info via official channel
text: This is an informational message from the district office about a skill training program. Registration is free and can be done at the official center. No payment or bank details are ever collected for this program.

label: benign
text: नमस्कार, उद्या तुमची डॉक्टरांची अपॉइंटमेंट सकाळी दहा वाजता आहे. कृपया जुने रिपोर्ट सोबत आणा. वेळेवर या. धन्यवाद.

label: benign
text: We tried to deliver your parcel today but you were not available. We will attempt delivery again tomorrow. You can also pick it up from the nearest hub. No payment is pending, it is prepaid.
